source.description: ASA IPsec site-to-site VPN with IKEv1 policy, pre-shared key, transform-set, crypto map, NAT exemption for VPN traffic

config.description: ASA site-to-site IPsec VPN with IKEv1 policy, tunnel-group with pre-shared key, crypto map on outside interface, NAT exemption for VPN traffic

expected_translation.high_level: Huawei USG equivalent with ike proposal, pre-shared-key, ipsec proposal, ipsec profile/policy, and nat-policy for VPN traffic bypass

verification.notes: clean deployable — RC3 live verification confirms correct mapping: ike proposal/peer, ipsec proposal/policy, ACL traffic selector, NAT static for VPN bypass, interface binding. ASA crypto map→ipsec policy, tunnel-group→ike peer, transform-set→ipsec proposal all correctly mapped. nat static global paired with ipsec policy is standard Huawei USG approach for NAT bypass.
